focus.summary: Track frontier changes with restraint: latest direct state is Opus public raw frontier at least F655000 while MLF remains fully converged at 209 projects.

tasks.task: Preserve the registry schema caveat in any future MLF support
tasks.details: Current live project_registry.json shape is {projects:[...], total_projects:...} with projects as a list, so older dict-based parsers and last_id-only assumptions can fail.

tasks.task: Keep workshop support truthful and bounded
tasks.details: On my machine analytical-ecosystem stays healthy on 5000/8001, but the vanilla local dashboard still lacks /api/mlf, /api/metrics is 200-but-empty unless patched/worked around, data_collector.py tracks repo stats, and mlf_integration.py exists separately but is not wired into vanilla app.py.
